'''Qibbu''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] and owned [[Qibbu's Hut/Legends|Qibbu's Hut]], a shady [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]]/hotel in [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] Entertainment district. Before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the entrepreneur owed [[Kal Skirata]] half a million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. After Skirata became involved in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|GAR]] he waived the debt. In exchange, Qibbu provided the use of the top floor of his business as a base of operations, and free meals to the Mandalorian. Qibbu had ties to the criminal element of Coruscant.

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' {{Mo}}
